title: Moderation Update – April 29, 2026
body: Queue triaged (6 reports). Actions taken: BANNED spam_wave_42 (phishing links across multiple channels) and toxic_runner (repeated harassment of newcomers). WARNED bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automated replies). CLOSED without action: reports against trusted_helper (moderation dispute, no violation) and core_maintainer (false positive from brigading). Report on new_member_17 closed as low-severity formatting issue. Community safety remains our priority — thank you for reporting.
